programs.title: Mountain Men
programs.desc: Tom and Nancy create a masterpiece out of a raw wolf hide; Jake and his young dogs tangle with two mountain lion kittens; Eustace teaches his neighbors how to put food on the table; Mike goes full fur on Whale Island; Ice jam traps Josh.

programs.title: Mountain Men
programs.desc: Jake carries his best dog off the mountain after a battle with a large mountain lion; Mike flies to the end of the earth for the last round-up; Martha and Ellie rescue a hunter stranded in sub-zero temperatures.

programs.title: Mountain Men
programs.desc: Kidd and Harry bring down an enormous bull bison; Eustace races the weather to provide his neighbors with heat; Martha and Elli battle nasty terrain while transporting their prized moose harvest back to civilization; Jake pursues mountain lions.

programs.title: Mountain Men
programs.desc: Martha and Elli stand their ground in a dangerous encounter with a bull moose; Mike sets off for uncharted territory; Tom resurrects a primitive recurve bow; Jake is hot on the trail of a mating pair of mountain lions.
